ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF(OR($Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_WFs__c), FALSE, (RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Rent' && ISBLANK( leaseworks__Rent__c ) && TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) != 'Predelivery Rent' && ( text(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Pending' || (text(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Approved' &&( text(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Partially Paid' ||text(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Partially Credited' || text(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Paid' || text(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Deferred' || text(leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)=='Open'))|| text(leaseworks__Status__c)=='Cancelled-Pending')) )
